clients.headline: Healthy: checked this week and data is flowing; suggesting since 2 July 2026.
clients.mostUseful: Of the 300 nights it would have cut prices on so far, 164 (55%) booked anyway with no cut.
weekOutcomeSentences: Of 120 nights the system would have dropped the price on, 68 booked anyway with no drop, at an average of £95 a night against the £78 it would have dropped to.
40 stayed empty and 12 were booked but later cancelled.
safetySentences: 14 would-be price drops were held back for Stay Belfast in the latest daily check (6 July 2026): 8 because the price is already at its minimum, 4 because the night is during an event and priced up on purpose, 2 because the price has already been dropped recently.
blindSpots: We cannot yet see engine price moves for Stay Belfast because no engine key is connected, so we read prices from the booking calendar instead.
comingUp: Stay Belfast: Fleadh Cheoil (2 August 2026 to 9 August 2026) is priced up 40%, so no drops will be suggested for those nights.

promoSentences: About 1 in 10 of the last 214 bookings through booking.com came with a much bigger discount than is typical for that channel, so those filled nights were not full-rate wins.
